title: Weights, Measures, and Money Bibliography
content:
11.7 Weights, Measures, and Money Bibliography

Alexander, David, and Pat Alexander, editors. 1973. “Linear Measures.” In The Lion Handbook to the Bible, page 105. Berkhamsted, England: Lion Publishing.

———. 1973. “Measurements of Capacity.” In The Lion Handbook to the Bible, pages 106–107. Berkhamsted, England: Lion Publishing.

———. 1973. “Money.” In The Lion Handbook to the Bible, pages 108–109. Berkhamsted, England: Lion Publishing.

———. 1973. “Weights and Measures.” In The Lion Handbook to the Bible, page 104. Berkhamsted, England: Lion Publishing.

Bratcher, Robert G. 1959. “Weights, Money, Measures, and Time.” The Bible Translator 10:165–174.

Fry, Euan. 1978. “Translating Biblical Measurements.” The Bible Translator 29:237–243.

Huey, F. B. 1975. “Weights and Measures.” In Zondervan Pictorial Encyclopedia of the Bible (Volume 5, pages 913–923). Edited by Merrill C. Tenney. Grand Rapids: Zondervan.

Louw, Johannes P., and Eugene A. Nida. 1988; 2nd edition, 1989. “Money and Monetary Units.” In Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament based on Semantic Domains (Volume 1, pages 62–64). New York: United Bible Societies.

———. 1988; 2nd edition, 1989. “Specific Measures of Volume.” In Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament based on Semantic Domains (Volume 1, pages 709–710). New York: United Bible Societies.

Margot, Jean-Claude. 1989. “Revision of the Français Courant Bible.” The Bible Translator 40:236–241.

Mundhenk, Norm. 1986. “Notes: The Translation of Shekel (šeqel).” The Bible Translator 37:237–238.

Ortiz, Pedro. 1996. “Translating Terms of Measurement.” The Bible Translator 47:413–419.

Powell, Marvin. A. 1992. “Weights and Measures.” In The Anchor Bible Dictionary, Volume 6, pages 897–908. Edited by David Noel Freedman. New York: Doubleday.

Schneider, T. 1998. “Containers and Contents: A case of functional equiva-lence.” The Bible Translator 49:215–225.

Strong, James. 1888. “Metrology.” In Cyclopaedia of Biblical, Theological, and Ecclesiastical Literature, Volume 6, pages 192–199. Edited by John M’Clintock and James Strong. New York: Harper.

de Vaux, Roland. 1961; 2nd edition, 1973. Ancient Israel: Its Life and Institutions, pages 195–209. Translated by John McHugh. London: Darton, Long-man and Todd.
